mapper.select: SELECT account_no, member_id, bank_code, balance, hold_amount, account_status FROM ACCOUNT WHERE account_no = #{accountNo} FOR UPDATE
SELECT account_no, member_id, bank_code, balance, hold_amount, account_status FROM ACCOUNT WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACCOUNT (account_no, member_id, bank_code, balance, hold_amount, account_status, created_at) VALUES (#{accountNo}, #{memberId}, #{bankCode}, 0, 0, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE)
